---
title: "assignment"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(edgeR) 
  library(epiwraps)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(sechm)
})
```

```{r download}
data_url <- "https://ethz-ins.org/content/mouse_mm38_hippocampus.peakCounts.SE.rds"
dest_file <- "mouse_mm38_hippocampus.peakCounts.SE.rds"


if (!file.exists(dest_file)) {
  options(timeout = 3600)
  download.file(data_url, dest_file, mode = "wb")
  message("Data downloaded successfully.")
} else {
  message("Data loaded from local cache.")
}


se <- readRDS(dest_file)
```

```{r Data Cleaning and Preperation}
# 1. Filter out Sex (X, Y) and Mitochondrial (MT) chromosomes to focus on autosomes --> otherwise heatmap is only focused X/Y genes 
all_chrs <- seqlevels(se)
chrs_to_keep <- all_chrs[!all_chrs %in% c("X", "Y", "MT")]
se_sub <- se[seqnames(rowRanges(se)) %in% chrs_to_keep, ]
seqlevels(se_sub) <- seqlevelsInUse(se_sub) # Clean up memory


rownames(se_sub) <- paste0("peak_", 1:nrow(se_sub))

#Extract metadata from sample names
sample_names <- colnames(se_sub)
se_sub$Condition <- factor(ifelse(grepl("Control", sample_names), "Control", "FSS"))
se_sub$Sex <- factor(ifelse(grepl("female", sample_names), "Female", "Male"))

# Verify 
head(colData(se_sub))
```

```{r Differentical Analysis 1 (Stressed vs. Controll)}

dds_stress <- edgeR::DGEList(assay(se_sub), group = se_sub$Condition) 

# Default TMM normalization and estimate dispersions
dds_stress <- edgeR::calcNormFactors(dds_stress) 
dds_stress <- edgeR::estimateDisp(dds_stress)

# Run the exact test for the FSS vs Control comparison
et_stress <- exactTest(dds_stress)

# Extract and print the top 10 most significant regions
res_stress <- as.data.frame(topTags(et_stress, n = 10))
print("Top 10 regions for Stressed (FSS) vs Control:")
res_stress
```

```{r Heatmap for Stressed vs. Controll}
# Put data into edgeR object using the Stress column
assay(se_sub, "logcpm") <- log1p(cpm(dds_stress))


topRegions_stress <- rownames(res_stress)

# Plot heatmap grouped by Condition
sechm(se_sub, features = topRegions_stress, gaps_at = "Condition", do.scale = TRUE)
```

```{r Differential Analysis 2 Male vs. Female}
# Put data into edgeR object using the Sex column
dds_sex <- edgeR::DGEList(assay(se_sub), group = se_sub$Sex) 

# Default TMM normalization and estimate dispersions
dds_sex <- edgeR::calcNormFactors(dds_sex) 
dds_sex <- edgeR::estimateDisp(dds_sex)

# Male vs Female comparison
et_sex <- exactTest(dds_sex)

# Extract and print the top 10 most significant regions
res_sex <- as.data.frame(topTags(et_sex, n = 10))
print("Top 10 regions for Male vs Female (Autosomes only):")
res_sex
```

```{r Heatmap for Male vs. Female }
# Sex normalization
assay(se_sub, "logcpm") <- log1p(cpm(dds_sex))

# Get the names of the top 10 regions
topRegions_sex <- rownames(res_sex)

# Plot heatmap grouped by Sex
sechm(se_sub, features = topRegions_sex, gaps_at = "Sex", do.scale = TRUE)
```
